x-enumeration-literals.name: Revolving Credit Feature
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Allows the customer to borrow up to a pre-approved credit limit repeatedly, with repayments freeing up available credit for further use.

Comment:
Example: Credit card facilities or overdraft accounts.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Term Loan Feature
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Installment / Term Loan Feature: Provides a lump sum of funds that the customer repays over a fixed period through scheduled installments.

Comment:
Example: Personal loans, auto loans, or mortgage loans.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Secured Credit Feature
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Secured Credit Feature: Credit granted against collateral provided by the customer to mitigate risk.

Comment:
Example: Mortgage loan secured by the property or auto loan secured by the vehicle.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Unsecured Credit Feature
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Credit granted without requiring collateral, relying on the customers creditworthiness.

Comment:
Example: Personal loans, credit cards without a deposit.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Credit Limit Feature
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Credit Limit / Exposure Feature: Defines the maximum amount of credit a customer can access under a product.

Comment:
Example: Credit card limit or overdraft limit.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Interest Feature
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Interest / Pricing Feature: Determines how interest is calculated and applied to the borrowed amount.

Comment:
Example: Fixed-rate mortgage vs. variable-rate personal loan.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Repayment Feature
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Repayment / Credit Plan Feature: Defines the schedule, method, and terms of repayment for borrowed funds.

Comment:
Example: Monthly EMI, bullet repayment, or revolving repayment.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Credit Assessment Feature
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Risk / Credit Assessment Feature: Evaluates the customers ability to repay and determines creditworthiness before approval.

Comment:
Example: Credit scoring and collateral evaluation.
